summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 2 user-reported fixes: (1) Scrollspy timing with IntersectionObserver rootMargin '-20% 0px -60% 0px' to prevent premature active state switching, and (2) Custom Framer Motion AnimatePresence modal with backdrop blur, multiple close methods, and proper unmounting. Both fixes verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: FIX 1 - Scrollspy Timing: 'Projects' remains active while scrolling through all project cards (does NOT prematurely switch to 'Home')
FIX 1 - Scrollspy Timing: Active sidebar item switches to 'Experience' only when Experience section heading reaches near top of viewport
FIX 1 - Scrollspy Timing: Active item switches correctly for Tech Stack, Education, and Contact sections
FIX 1 - Scrollspy Timing: 'Contact' is active at the very bottom (bottom fallback working)
FIX 1 - Scrollspy Timing: Only one nav item is active at a time
FIX 1 - Scrollspy Timing: Active item has blue background (bg-[rgba(37,99,235,0.15)]) and 3px blue left border (border-[#2563EB])
FIX 2 - Project Modal: Modal is a custom Framer Motion modal (NOT radix shadcn Dialog)
FIX 2 - Project Modal: Overlay has backdrop-blur-[8px] and dark background (bg-black/80)
FIX 2 - Project Modal: Modal contains 4 screenshots in 2x2 grid
FIX 2 - Project Modal: Modal contains description, tech tags, and buttons ('Live Demo' and 'Go to Website')
FIX 2 - Project Modal: Close button (data-testid='project-modal-close-button') works and modal unmounts
FIX 2 - Project Modal: ESC key closes modal and modal unmounts
FIX 2 - Project Modal: Clicking overlay (outside modal content) closes modal and modal unmounts
FIX 2 - Project Modal: Modal can be opened and closed multiple times reliably
FIX 2 - Project Modal: Exit animation completes and modal disappears from DOM (AnimatePresence working)
